---
title: Prueba Técnica
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: slides-fondo.png
  data-background-size: cover
  data-background-opacity: "0.9"
author: "*Jesus L. Monroy*"
date: '2026-03-22'
date-format: MMM, YYYY
lang: en
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: custom.scss
    brand: _brand.yml
    auto-stretch: false
    embed-resources: true
    view-distance: 10
    slide-number: c/t
    footer: © 2026
    transition: fade
    transition-speed: slow
    fig-cap-location: bottom
execute:
  echo: false
jupyter: python3
---

# Dashboard de Incidencia Delictiva {background-image="slides-fondo.png"}

<!-- section2 -->
## Overview {.smaller background-image="slides-fondo.png"}

Esta aplicación está elaborada con Python, Shiny y Polars.
El tablero está diseñado para monitorear la incidencia delictiva en la Ciudad de México.

:::{.goals}
::::{.goals-container}
**Nota**

Puedes interactuar con la aplicación desde esta diapositiva!
:::
:::

## {background-image="slides-fondo.png"}
::: {style="text-align: center;"}
```{=html}
<iframe src="https://jesuslm-sesnsp-cni-tablero.share.connect.posit.cloud"
        data-external="1"
        style="width: 150%; height: 850px; border: none; transform: scale(0.8); transform-origin: 0 0;">
</iframe>
```
:::


<!-- section -->
## {.center background-image="slides-fondo.png"}

### Contacto {style="color: #781310; font-size: 80px; font-style: bold;"}

::: {style="color: #6e653f; font-size: 37px; font-style: bold;"}
Jesus L. Monroy
:::

::: {style="color: #6f7271; font-size: 22px; font-style: italic;"}
Economist & Data Scientist
:::

::: {style="color: #6f7271; font-size: 14px; width: 33%; text-align: justify;"}
Passionate about creating tools that make data accessible and impactful using SQL, Python, Streamlit, and Tableau in sectors like Public Security, e-commerce, and Healthcare.     
BA in Economics, MA in Information Technology, and Data Science and Machine Learning certification.
:::

::: {style="font-size: 15px;"}
[Portfolio]([https://jesuslm-my-website.share.connect.posit.cloud](https://jesuslm-my-website.share.connect.posit.cloud/)) | 
[Linkedin]([https://www.linkedin.com/in/j3sus-lm](https://www.linkedin.com/in/j3sus-lm)) | 
[Twitter]([https://x.com/j3suslm](https://x.com/j3suslm)) | 
[Tableau]([https://tinyurl.com/jesuslm-tableau](https://tinyurl.com/jesuslm-tableau))
:::
